search.response_shape: GeoJSON FeatureCollection; features[].id is hotel ID (string), features[].properties.name, features[].geometry.coordinates

response_failure.message: Failed. Please check your username and password.

reservation.note: customerName and username are both required as separate params, even if equal

credentials.password_format: str(i) repeated 10 times, sent as plaintext

valid_date_range.note: Outside this range, rate plans may not exist and search may return empty results

hotel_capacity.note: Capacity is per-hotel total room count (the 'number' collection in reservation-db), NOT per-date. No per-date inventory beyond this cap.

state_persistence_note: Reservations accumulate in MongoDB across runs. checker and benchmark must use partitioned hotel IDs / date pairs / user IDs to avoid interference, and must design overbooking checks to be idempotent across repeated runs.
